templates.name: Brand ambassador / sponsorship / affiliate program
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! The best way to discuss this is to contact us via this link: https://support.colourpop.com/hc/en-us/requests/new Our team is happy to chat.

templates.name: Shipping time
templates.content: Our processing time usually takes 2-4 business days and we usually ship via USPS. Once shipped it will take 3-5 business days for domestic orders and 10-21 business days for international orders.

templates.name: Phone support
templates.content: We don't offer phone support right now but I'd be happy to help you over text, let me know what I can do for you!

templates.name: Are your products vegan?
templates.content: ColourPop products bearing the Vegan emblem are developed and manufactured without the use of any animal-based ingredients.

templates.name: How do I apply the Brow Boss?
templates.content:
Please follow the steps below:

1. For natural definition, lightly create short, hair-like strokes to the sparse areas of your brows.
2. Build up the colour as desired, and use the attached spoolie to comb through brow hairs.
3. Use Brow Boss Gel to keep brow hairs in place.

templates.name: Are you cruelty free?
templates.content: We are extremely proud to be cruelty free! No outside company tests on animals for us, and none of our suppliers test on animals.

templates.name: How do I apply the No Filter Concealer?
templates.content: You can use it to conceal blemishes, highlight your under eyes, or contour! Blend with a sponge, a brush, or fingers to create an airbrushed finish.

templates.name: Military / First responder / Healthcare / Teacher discount
templates.content: Thank you for your service! We don't have any specific discounts like that but if it helps, you can check out the items we have on sale here: https://colourpop.com/collections/sales-offers

templates.name: How do I apply the Brow Brass Gel?
templates.content: Brush through brows, following the direction that the hairs naturally grow. Apply over any brow product or wear alone. You can also take a look at this video here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uCj_A89KwNQ&ab_channel=colourpopcosmetics

templates.name: Customer support
templates.content: The best way to handle this is to contact us via this link: https://colourpop.com/pages/contact-us Our team is happy to help!

templates.name: Social media
templates.content: Give us a follow on IG: https://www.instagram.com/colourpopcosmetics/ and FB here: https://www.facebook.com/ColourPopCosmetics

templates.name: Restock
templates.content: Please sign up for our newsletter to be the first to hear about any restocks! We also announce restock dates via social media.

templates.name: How do I apply the Lux Lipstick?
templates.content: First prime your lips with our Lippie Primer to provide a smooth surface for your lipstick, then define your lips with Lippie Pencil and now you're ready to apply your Lux Lipstick.

templates.name: Rewards / referral
templates.content: Unfortunately, we do not have a rewards or loyalty program at this time.

templates.name: Wholesale inquiries
templates.content: Thank you for your interest! Unfortunately, we do not currently sell wholesale nor do we authorize the resale of our products.

templates.name: Do you offer samples of your products?
templates.content: Due to the low cost nature of our products we do not currently send samples. Thank you for your interest!

templates.name: Free shipping
templates.content: We offer free shipping on all orders over $30 within the contiguous US. Maybe you can add something else to reach the minimum?

templates.name: Cancel / edit order
templates.content: Unfortunately, we cannot modify or cancel orders once they have been placed. We can only try to modify the shipping address if the order has not yet entered the packing process. We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause!

templates.name: Store location / retailer
templates.content: Our products are currently available at Ulta! Our Ulta babies will only be available at select Ulta stores and ulta.com for the US and Canada.

templates.name: Return policy
templates.content: Unfortunately, due to the low-cost nature of our products, once an order has shipped, we are unable to offer refunds, returns, or exchanges and all sales are final. You can check out our detailed return policy here: https://support.colourpop.com/hc/en-us/articles/115000433831-Return-Policy

templates.name: Why Isn’t A Promo / Code Working On My Order?
templates.content: Our promotions and discount codes have certain exclusions that apply. Excluded products will not be eligible for the promotional discount and will not count towards the minimum order subtotal required to qualify for the promotion. Exclusions can include but are not limited to: newly launched collections, babies on last call, Disney, and select palettes/kits/sets/collaborations.
